Luzardo's L14 SIERA 4.84 over only 11.2IP is noise by my weighting table — AGG anchor dominates. PHI bullpen is elite (Duran 1.90 ERA, fresh), while MIA's Fairbanks at 6.75 ERA is a liability. picks.reason: Hunter Brown (AGG xFIP 3.15, SIERA 3.36, Stf+ 105) is one of the better arms on the slate by aggregate metrics — no L14 data but the AGG anchor over 196IP is substantial and trustworthy. His L3 shows 4.2IP/0ER/9K and 6.0IP/1ER/8K — elite stuff in limited view. Valdez (AGG xFIP 3.65) is respectable but L14 xFIP 4.99 over 10.0IP [sm] trends negative; Houston lineup vs. LHP is strong (wRC+ 114, Alvarez 186). HOU bullpen has Hader (0.00 ERA, 43.8% K%) available and fresh. DET is 30-42 away (12-26), cold offense. Both total prices flagged as suspect — avoided total. picks.reason: Detmers (AGG xFIP 3.48, SIERA 3.27, Stf+ 105) is the best-priced starter on this slate — his L14 xFIP 2.85/SIERA 2.78 over 13.0IP clears the 20IP threshold needed for 60% L14 weighting? No — 13IP falls in the 11-19IP bracket (40% L14/60% AGG). Blended: 0.60×3.48 + 0.40×2.85 = 2.088+1.14 = ~3.23 blended xFIP. Kelly is in distress: AGG xFIP 4.21 but L14 xFIP 5.98/SIERA 6.01 over 11.0IP [sm] — sits right at the boundary, I weight 40% L14: 0.60×4.21 + 0.40×5.98 = 2.526+2.392 = ~4.92 blended. That's a massive 1.69-run true ERA gap. AZ lineup vs. LHP is elite (Carroll 216, wRC+ 118 aggregate) but Detmers has a 22.1% K-BB% and excellent stuff (Stf+ 105) to neutralize it. LAA bullpen is passable; AZ bullpen is fresh and solid (Sewald 3.08, Ginkel 2.60) but the starter mismatch is enormous. At -105, market implies ~51.2%; my estimate via run-differential framework (Detmers true ERA ~3.6 adjusted vs. Kelly ~5.2 adjusted, park neutral at 108°F likely roof closed): LAA win probability ~59.3%. Gap = 8.1 pts. No [sm] flag on Detmers' AGG (81IP). Kelly's L14 is [sm] at 11IP — blocks nothing for the LAA bet. Clean data on my side.
picks.data_gap: Roof status at Chase Field unconfirmed (108°F almost certainly closed — if open, park factor shifts; affects totals more than side). AZ lineup confirmation vs. LHP would sharpen platoon edge.

parlay.reason:
Both legs are independent — different opponents, different parks, different game times. Detmers vs. Kelly is the clearest starter-quality mismatch on the slate; Brown vs. Valdez is a solid independent edge. Neither game's outcome affects the other. The parlay pays +150, implying ~40%, which is nearly exactly my combined probability estimate — this is break-even at best, but given positive CLV on both legs independently, combining at a fair parlay price is defensible for 1 unit.

---

best_bet.why_this: Detmers' blended xFIP (~3.23) vs. Kelly's blended xFIP (~4.92) represents the widest true pitcher quality gap on the slate, and the market has LAA as a near-pick'em at -105 — 8.1 points of edge at a price where a win nearly doubles the unit.
